title: Trump vows to maintain Iran blockade, Tehran threatens 'practical' action
snippet: Trump told Axios the blockade is 'somewhat more effective than the bombing' and 'they are choking like a stuffed pig.' He rejected Iran's Hormuz-only deal, demanding nuclear deal. Iran's senior security source told Press TV the blockade will be met with 'practical and unprecedented action.'
tag_reason: Trump's explicit 'blockade until nuclear deal' policy statement and Iran's 'practical action' threat are new developments on 4/29
